steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The first sentence introduces a classification system with three genres. The second sentence exemplifies it, using “is classified as...whereas” to show examples of different genres. The blank must mark this transition from system to example.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: For instance directly marks an example—it shows Much Ado About Nothing exemplifies the classification system, and the “whereas” then contrasts it with Richard II. The other choices suggest continuation (in addition), similarity (similarly), or confusing contrast (however). That matches choice C — C is correct.
